_comment: Shipped preset for the 3D-render-to-product-shot flow (Vectary act 3). Copy of the locally-proven image_qwen_Image_2512_controlnet5-2 graph: control image -> Canny -> Qwen-Image-2512 Fun ControlNet-Union + Lightning 4-step LoRA. The subgraph instance is node 86, so inner nodes get '86:<id>' after browser-side expansion. Output size follows the control image (ResizeImageMaskNode to 1.6MP), so the stage's resolution/aspect combos are intentionally unbound. E2E-verified: untextured Vaporeon viewport capture -> glossy ceramic figurine product photo with the silhouette locked.
label: Qwen Product Shot (Canny)
description: Structure-locked FULL repaint: Canny edges from the reference image steer Qwen-Image-2512 (Fun ControlNet-Union + Lightning 4-step). Only the silhouette survives — colors and materials come from the prompt, so describe them explicitly. To keep the reference's colors/materials, use the image-edit stage's Qwen Edit 2511 instead. Output size follows the reference image.

image.error: Product shot needs a reference image — wire a 3D capture (or any image) into the stage.

text.error: Describe the finished shot — subject, material, lighting, backdrop (e.g. 'glossy blue ceramic figurine, studio product photography, soft light').
